results.title: Kalshi promo code PENNLIVE: NBA Finals player predictions markets before Game 1
results.description: The NBA Finals are set, and if you want to trade on Victor Wembanyama props, the Kalshi promo code PENNLIVE offers predicting on the Spurs' superstar forward's output against the Knicks.

results.title: Arbitrator rules Terry Rozier forfeits Heat salary, but contact with Heat again allowed
results.description: MIAMI — As Terry Rozier awaits trial on federal charges in relation to his alleged involvement in an NBA betting scheme, papers filed Wednesday show that the former Miami Heat guard will not be receiving the majority of his salary...

results.title: CrowdStrike’s (NASDAQ:CRWD) Q1 CY2026 Sales Beat Estimates But Stock Drops
results.description: Cybersecurity platform provider CrowdStrike (NASDAQ:CRWD) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 25.6% year on year to $1.39 billion. The company expects next quarter’s revenue to be around $1.44 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.10 per share was 3% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
